assets.name: lecture_05_frame_01.png
assets.rationale: Cleanest early shell-spectrum sketch; the S/P columns and level marks are legible enough to reconstruct the energy-level diagram.

assets.name: lecture_05_frame_02.png
assets.rationale: Best view of the multi-column board layout for atomic states and single-particle labels; useful as a reference for redrawing the state diagram.

assets.name: lecture_05_frame_03.png
assets.rationale: Readable exchange-symmetry board with the multi-particle wavefunction and red swap arrows visible; strong reference for the permutation discussion.
